log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dragonborn — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dragonborn — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 49/67
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 27/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 9/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 9/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (9/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Dragonborn — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dragonborn — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).

→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: -2/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!

--- Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 50/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 50/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
